Pull Request

Summary

Provide a brief description of the changes introduced by this pull request.

---

Type of Change

Select all that apply.

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Build or CI change
- [ ] Other

---

Related Issue

Link the related GitHub issue if applicable.

Example:

- Closes #123
- Fixes #45
- Related to #78

If there is no related issue, write:

N/A

---

Description

Describe your implementation.

Include:

- What changed
- Why the change was necessary
- How the solution works
- Any important design decisions

---

Screenshots

If the pull request changes the user interface, attach screenshots or screen recordings.

Before| After
(Optional)| (Optional)

---

Testing

Describe how the changes were tested.

Examples:

- Unit tests
- Instrumentation tests
- Manual testing
- Emulator
- Physical device

---

Checklist

Please confirm the following before requesting a review.

Code Quality

- [ ] Code builds successfully.
- [ ] Project compiles without errors.
- [ ] Existing functionality remains unaffected.
- [ ] Code follows the project architecture.
- [ ] No unnecessary files were added.
- [ ] No commented-out code remains.

Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass.
- [ ] Instrumentation tests pass (if applicable).
- [ ] Manual testing has been completed.

Documentation

- [ ] Documentation has been updated where required.
- [ ] README updated (if necessary).
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if necessary).

Security

- [ ] No secrets, passwords, API keys, or private data are included.
- [ ] Security implications have been considered.
- [ ] Sensitive information is properly protected.

User Experience

- [ ] UI changes follow Material Design guidelines.
- [ ] Accessibility has been considered.
- [ ] Dark theme compatibility verified (if applicable).

---

Breaking Changes

Does this pull request introduce breaking changes?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

If yes, explain the impact and any migration steps required.

---

Additional Notes

Include any additional information that reviewers should know before reviewing this pull request.

---

Reviewer Notes

Reviewers should verify:

- Code quality
- Architecture consistency
- Security considerations
- Performance impact
- Test coverage
- Documentation updates

---

Thank you for contributing to Dearog Password Manager.
